meta.note: Verify all rates annually. Social insurance rates vary by prefecture and employer size — these are standard Tokyo Metropolitan rates.

reducedRateItems: Food and non-alcoholic beverages (takeout and delivery only, not restaurant dining)
consumptionTax.roundingNote: When extracting pre-tax price from inclusive price: use Math.floor(inclusive / (1 + rate)). When adding tax: use Math.round(preTax * rate).

notes.healthInsurance: Employee share 5.0% — Tokyo rate. Varies by health insurance society.
notes.pension: Employee share 9.15% of standard monthly remuneration (標準報酬月額).
notes.pensionBaseCap: Pension premium is capped at standard monthly remuneration of ¥650,000.

incomeTax.reconstructionSurtaxNote: 2.1% of base income tax. Applied until 2037.

residentTax.note: Flat 10% of taxable income plus ¥5,000 per-capita levy (annual). Based on prior year income — calculator uses current year as estimate.
